title: RTS Craftable Light Blocks
description: Allows crafting all levels of light blocks using glass and a variety  of "glow" items
body:
Allows crafting all levels of light blocks using glass and a variety of "glow" items.

The player still cannot "see" the light blocks in survival mode or edit them once placed. Light Blocks can be destroyed by placing a block in their location.

All recipes will be unlocked once the player obtains a lantern.
